headlines.headline: Ervan Capital secures $75M contract with a leading cloud platform

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a significant $75M contract provides immediate revenue visibility and validates the company's market position.

headlines.headline: Ervan Capital reports record quarterly revenue, up 12% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 12% indicates strong operational momentum and positive financial health.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
